title: Finite Orthogonal Diagonalization Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite orthogonal-diagonalization bad eigenvalue QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact orthogonal diagonalization replay reads D[1,1] as 4 while a malformed row claims 5, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional spectral rows only when they add distinct orthogonality, multiplicity, characteristic-polynomial, perturbation, residual-bound, or eigensolver pressure; keep spectral theorem, convergence, perturbation theory, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational A, Q, Q^T, D, eigenvectors, eigenvalues, trace, determinant, and product as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false eigenvalue row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay reads the conflicting diagonal value.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep spectral theorem, diagonalization existence, multiplicity, perturbation theory, eigensolver convergence, and floating-point stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
